hooks.prompt: Hook-injected context does not survive context compaction. Silently re-read 06_Metadata/hot.md (relative to vault root /Users/roson/knowledge-base/coding-vault/) now to restore the hot cache. Do not announce this.

hooks.command: python3 -c "import os,time,json,subprocess; vault=subprocess.check_output(['git','rev-parse','--show-toplevel']).decode().strip(); f=os.path.join(vault,'06_Metadata','hot.md'); age=time.time()-os.path.getmtime(f); exit(0) if age<600 else (print(json.dumps({'systemMessage': 'hot.md not updated — last updated '+str(int(age//60))+'m ago. Update it before ending session.'})) or exit(1))"
